commands.author: jrex-jooni
commands.command: flagging the data point above for review — verified on 2026.6.9 that this silent-drop also fires on **clean `stopreason=stop`** completions (not just timeouts), with context-overflow compaction as a reliable trigger and a zero-overflow child failing identically. suggests the fix should key off "child produced no deliverable payload" rather than the timeout case specifically.
commands.freeform_prompt: flagging the data point above for review — verified on 2026.6.9 that this silent-drop also fires on **clean `stopReason=stop`** completions (not just timeouts), with context-overflow compaction as a reliable trigger and a zero-overflow child failing identically. Suggests the fix should key off "child produced no deliverable payload" rather than the timeout case specifically.

target.title: Sub-agent run timeout does not notify parent session (completion event silently dropped)
target.author: sunnydongbo
